home.heroSubtitle: Preserve and honor family traditions — Connecting past, present and future
home.featuresSubtitle: Modern tools to help you build and preserve your family genealogy easily
home.f1Desc: Display bloodline relationships across multiple generations with a beautiful, easy-to-understand interface.
home.f2Desc: Add and edit information for each family member with complete biographies.
home.f3Desc: Record and preserve important stories and events of the family lineage.
home.f4Desc: Drag and drop Word files or scanned images to quickly view genealogy content before processing.
home.f5Desc: Data is securely protected and easily shared with family members.
home.ctaSubtitle: In just a few simple steps, you can create a complete family tree for your lineage.
home.footer: © 2026 HCMUS Family Tree — Preserving traditions, connecting generations

docReader.pageSubtitle: Drag and drop Word files or scanned images to read source documents before extracting the family tree.
docReader.bannerTitle: Quickly read transliterations and scanned genealogy images
docReader.bannerDesc: This interface is ideal for the document review stage: view images, read Word content, cross-reference data before entering the analysis pipeline.
docReader.dropDesc: Supports scanned image viewing and Word content reading for Sino-Vietnamese genealogy research.
docReader.step1: 1. Drop a scanned genealogy image if you want to cross-reference directly with the original.
docReader.step2: 2. Drop a .docx file if you already have a transliterated or typed version.
docReader.step3: 3. Review the content, then move to the member and relationship extraction step.
docReader.previewAreaSubtitle: Preview the source file and extract content for genealogy analysis.
docReader.noPreview: No preview available for this format
docReader.cardImageDesc: Suitable for photos or scanned pages of genealogical documents, useful for layout and character reference.
docReader.cardDocxDesc: Suitable for transliterations or typed content, quickly extracts text for the extraction pipeline.
docReader.msgImageSuccess: Image loaded successfully. You can zoom in and cross-reference genealogy content directly.
docReader.msgDocxSuccess: Word content read and converted to plain text mode for your review.
docReader.msgEmptyDocx: Could not extract text content from this file.
docReader.errDocxParse: Could not read this Word file. Try a different .docx or switch to a scanned image.
docReader.errDocOld: Old .doc files cannot be extracted directly in the browser. Convert to .docx to read.
docReader.errUnsupported: Format not supported. Please use a .docx Word file or a scanned image.
